SEARCH
Package com.example.junimoapp

Class PrivateEventUnitTest

java.lang.Object
com.example.junimoapp.PrivateEventUnitTest
public class PrivateEventUnitTest extends Object
Local unit tests for private event, notification, and invitation logic. All tests call real methods on real model objects — not local variables. Stories covered: - US 02.01.02: Organizer creates a private event (no public listing, no QR) - US 01.04.03: Entrant can opt out of notifications - US 01.04.01: Entrant receives notification when selected by lottery - US 01.04.02: Entrant receives notification when not selected - US 01.05.07: Entrant can accept or decline a private event invitation - US 02.01.03: Organizer invites entrant to private event waiting list
